creator: wjw@digiware.nl
text:
(In reply to Jan Beich from comment #31)

I think we should not...

I'm in the process of updating the V12 port, and creating a V13 port.
Ceph-dev would be 14.0-Current in FreeBSD speak.

But people really wanting that should actually get ceph/master, since that now a days readily builds on FreeBSD.

So I guess I can let it go.

--WjW
